title: ToolTreaux Unisex Large Leather Workshop Apron Full Body with Pockets
description:
The ToolTreaux leather apron features nylon straps and reinforced rivets on the pockets ensuring a long service life, whether you’re a beginner in the workshop or a woodworking enthusiast. Designed with safety in mind, the leather apron women repels liquids and sparks to protect you and your clothing from dangerous materials. Our apron provides full body coverage which is a must have safety measure for woodworkers, metalworkers, ceramists, DIY projects at home or in the studio and more. The apron features two spacious front tool pockets that measure 7.5 x 6.5 inches, to keep tools and supplies organized. Easily store chisels, hammer, brushes, screwdriver, nuts and bits and more for quick access

ToolTreaux Unisex Large Leather Workshop Apron Full Body with Pockets

The ToolTreaux leather apron features nylon straps and reinforced rivets on the pockets ensuring a long service life, whether you’re a beginner in the workshop or a woodworking enthusiast.

Key Features

  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - ToolTreaux full body leather apron features reinforced rivets and nylon straps that are built to last. Sturdy pink leather will protect your clothing during woodworking and other workshop projects
  • REPELS LIQUID AND SPARKS - Designed with safety in mind, our leather apron keeps you and your clothing safe from dangerous sparks and liquids while working. Must-have full body coverage for woodworkers, metalworkers, and home improvement enthusiasts
  • SPACIOUS TOOL POCKETS - Apron features 2 front tool pockets, measuring 7.5” x 6.5” to keep tools handy. Store a hammer, drills, chisels, brushes, screwdrivers, and more for easy and quick access
  • ONE SIZE FITS MOST - Versatile leather apron measures 36” x 25” with adjustable straps for a custom comfort fit; one size fits most men and women. Great smock option for artists, painters, potters, and artisan crafters
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Dimensions: 36” x 25” (one size fits most); Pocket dimensions: 7.5” x 6.5”; Number of pockets: 2; Color: pink; Materials: leather, nylon; Reinforced rivets

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TTLEATHAPRNPNK
  • UPC: 810058481962
  • Size: One Size Fits Most

Designed with safety in mind, the leather apron women repels liquids and sparks to protect you and your clothing from dangerous materials. Our apron provides full body coverage which is a must have safety measure for woodworkers, metalworkers, ceramists, DIY projects at home or in the studio and more.

The apron features two spacious front tool pockets that measure 7.5 x 6.5 inches, to keep tools and supplies organized. Easily store chisels, hammer, brushes, screwdriver, nuts and bits and more for quick access.

Although originally intended for woodworking and workshop use, this versatile leather apron is a great smock option for painters, artists, potters and crafters alike. It measures 36 x 25 inches with adjustable nylon straps for a custom comfort fit, making it a one size fits most apron.
